title: Wildera SMP
description: The Wildera SMP Modpack! The SMP Cobblemon Server that is about world building and player lead economy and gyms!
body:
![Wildera SMP Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0688e87939798adfcf4b526412076b43ee7923c1_0.webp)Welcome to the Wildera Region! A vast frontier where every Pokémon species can be found. From crystal-studded mountains and endless deserts to lush forests and shimmering coastlines, this land is a meeting place for every habitat imaginable. Ancient mysteries, diverse ecosystems, and boundless adventure await Trainers brave enough to explore its endless horizons.

THIS MODPACK ONLY CONTAINS THE AUTOMOD MOD, RESOURCE PACK AND SHADERS! JOIN THE DISCORD TO GET THE INFORMATION ON HOW TO JOIN THE ACTUAL SERVER!

The Wildera SMP offers Player driven economy, Player towns, gyms, Elite four and champion. The goal of this SMP is to create our very own region! With each town connect by a route to the next closest town! 

Its a very casual SMP! We are focused on the Cobblemon and world building side of things! Use this Modpack to get started! 

Ensure to join the Discord to get the rest of the information! 

[Wildera SMP Discord ](https://discord.gg/qs9ExHkUDc)

![Simple Wildera Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/275539cdfeef4c04dc9ac040fd9c79e72449fa0d.png)
